title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Medlife Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Medlife Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Medlife Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Medlife Advisory Limited:
Medlife Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife Advisory Limited!
